title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Whitebeard Pirates, Oden, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Roger as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're only here because the Captain needs your "knowledge"...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We won't accept you as fast as the captain did, ya hear?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, a port city. Do they have ingredients?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait, Oden. Don't advance like that without thinking!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard Pirates
dialogue.text: The Captain is gonna kill you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh?! isn't this area lawless?! hmm... whatever, I don't care. Go, men!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: That's why I'm in a hurry!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This world is huge! It truly is endless!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to think that there are people living in the sky.. Unbelievable!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wow, a bell made of gold! How are we going to take this captain?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can come back when you're a captain, buggy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I have no time for this.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's at least take a piece or two!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The stone has quite a voice, so it was easy to find...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Does she happen to say something about "incredibly power"?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Information about a weapon called "Poseidon" is written here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Write what I say on it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I have come here and will lead this passage to the farthest ends of th world!!!"

dialogue.speaker: Roger
dialogue.text: I'm going to the end, Roger...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The goal for which you risked your life... the final chapter of your great adventure!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 42 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
